license_note: Only truly-open (MIT / CC0 / public-domain) DBC files are bundled here so they can be installed offline on a shipped device with one click. The files below are authored for AutoPi and released under CC0-1.0. To add more, drop an openly-licensed .dbc in this folder and add an entry with its real license; anything not clearly permissive stays a link in the catalog instead.

databases.name: Generic powertrain (RPM, speed, coolant, throttle)
databases.author: AutoPi
databases.notes: A neutral powertrain database to practice decoding with, and a starting point you can retag for a specific vehicle.

databases.name: Generic body / comfort (doors, lights, locks)
databases.author: AutoPi
databases.notes: A neutral body-status database covering common comfort signals, ready to install without a network.
